title: Web Scraping | Awesome MCP Servers
description: A curated collection of MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Search and discover MCP servers and clients.

servers.name: Bright Data
servers.description: Discover, extract, and interact with the web - one interface powering automated access across the public internet.

servers.name: 302AI
servers.description: BrowserUse An AI-powered browser automation server for natural language control and web research.

servers.name: BrowserUse
servers.description: An AI-powered browser automation server for natural language control and web research.

servers.name: Agentic Deep Researcher
servers.description: A deep research agent powered by Crew AI and the LinkUp API.

servers.name: AgentQL
servers.description: Enable AI agents to get structured data from unstructured web with AgentQL.

servers.name: AI Shopping Assistant
servers.description: A conversational AI shopping assistant for web-based product discovery and decision-making.

servers.name: Airbnb
servers.description: Search for Airbnb listings and retrieve their details.

servers.name: Airbnb MCP Server
servers.description: Search for Airbnb listings and retrieve detailed information without an API key.

servers.name: Amazon MCP Server
servers.description: Scrapes and searches for products on Amazon.

servers.name: Any Browser MCP
servers.description: Attaches to existing browser sessions using the Chrome DevTools Protocol for automation and interaction.

servers.name: anybrowse
servers.description: Convert any URL to LLM-ready Markdown via real Chrome browsers. 3 tools: scrape, crawl, search. Free via MCP, pay-per-use via x402.

servers.name: Anysite
servers.description: Turn any website into an API

servers.name: Apify
servers.description: Extract data from any website with thousands of scrapers, crawlers, and automations

servers.name: Automatic MCP Discovery
servers.description: AI powered automation toolkit which acts as an agent that discovers MCP servers for you. Point it at GitHub/npm/configure your own discovery, let GPT or Claude analyze the API or MCP or any tool, get ready-to-ship plugin configs. Zero manual work.

servers.name: B2Proxy
servers.description: 1GB Free Trial, World's Leading Proxy Service Platform, Efficient Data Collection

servers.name: Bilibili
servers.description: Interact with the Bilibili video website, enabling actions like searching for videos, retrieving video information, and accessing user data.

servers.name: Bilibili Comments
servers.description: Fetch Bilibili video comments in bulk, including nested replies. Requires a Bilibili cookie for authentication.

servers.name: Booli MCP Server
servers.description: Access Swedish real estate data from Booli.se through a GraphQL API.

servers.name: brosh
servers.description: A browser screenshot tool to capture scrolling screenshots of webpages using Playwright, with support for intelligent section identification and multiple output formats.

servers.name: Browser MCP
servers.description: A fast, lightweight MCP server that empowers LLMs with browser automation via Puppeteer's structured accessibility data, featuring optional vision mode for complex visual understanding and flexible, cross-platform configuration.

servers.name: Browser Use
servers.description: An AI-driven browser automation server for natural language control and web research, with CLI access.

servers.name: Browser Use MCP Server
servers.description: An MCP server that allows AI agents to control a web browser using the browser-use library.

servers.name: BrowserAct
servers.description: BrowserAct MCP Server is a standardized MCP service that lets MCP clients connect to the BrowserAct platform to discover and run browser automation workflows, access results/files and related storage, and trigger real-world actions via natural language.

servers.name: Browserbase
servers.description: Automate browser interactions in the cloud (e.g. web navigation, data extraction, form filling, and more)

servers.name: BrowserCat
servers.description: Automate remote browsers using the BrowserCat API.

servers.name: BrowserCat MCP Server
servers.description: Remote browser automation using the BrowserCat API.

servers.name: BrowserLoop
servers.description: Take screenshots and read console logs from web pages using Playwright.

servers.name: Buienradar
servers.description: Fetches precipitation data for a given latitude and longitude using Buienradar.

servers.name: CarDeals-MCP
servers.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) service that indexes and queries car-deal contexts - fast, flexible search for vehicle listings and marketplace data.
